title: AgentTask
description: Validated task the Prompt Layer emits to the Orchestrator (instructions.md §9). Carries the signed TASK JWT with the allowed-tools set; the MCP Gateway re-verifies it (defense in depth, §9.4/§13).

plan.description: 3-7 high-level steps (§9.2); the agent may revise but this frames execution.

allowed_tools.description: Tools this turn may call, computed from tool_policies (§9.4).

approval_tools.description: Tools that require a human approval before executing.

task_jwt.description: Signed TASK JWT (sub, allowed_tools, approval_tools, exp) — §13.4.

on_behalf_of.description: Team mode (§3.2): requester identity when sub=agent-org.
